title: Access up to $100,000 in TiDB Cloud Credits
description: Scale your startup from MVP to millions of users with the distributed SQL database that grows with you. Get up to $100k in TiDB Cloud credits, expert technical support, and co-marketing opportunities designed for data-intensive startups from Seed to Series B.
eligibility: AWS Activate members who meet the offer's current provider, account, and regional requirements.
value: Access up to $100,000 in TiDB Cloud Credits
